title: Level Twitter (Joke)

{{Joke}} __NOTOC__ ==Meta Note== This page mentions multiple different platforms/people, such as Minecraft by Mojang, Twitter by uh... just Twitter I guess, that vegan teacher (the youtube channel), Mobile games, YouTube, BTS, KPOP, and dream, as in the Minecraft YouTuber. ==Main Level== Level Twitter is the dumbest and weirdest level in the backrooms.
[[File:Twitter logo.png|thumb|180px]]
'''Survival Difficulty: Class Twitter'''
'''》ratio'''
'''》saying secure is insensitive'''
'''》entities can be here if not your racist'''
[[Category:Class Twitter]]
==Description== {{Blurimage|file=Dirty room.jpg|Level Twitter|caption=A picture of one of the rooms in '''Level Twitter.'''}} '''Level Twitter''' appears to be a small, dirty room where every person is in a different room. '''Level Twitter''' has a small computer that you can use to access Twitter (And unfortunately, only Twitter). The Twitter on your computer gives you ''10,000'' pings every second, and it multiplies every time you tweet. The main components of the entities on this level are Karens, KPOP stans, BTS stans, animal activists like the vegan teacher, and just about every other bad person in this world. If you say anything bad about anything, your current location in the level will be doxxed by SSSniperwolf and [[Entity 10|Skin-Stealers]] will start running towards you. After you pick up a computer on this level, the door opens and you get to walk inside the Twitter headquarters, where some rooms have thousands of pings going on that can burst your eardrums. This level has lots of trash all over the floors.

==Entities== ===The Dream Stans===
[[File:Twitter logo.png|alt=|thumb]]
'''Entity Hazard: Class Dream'''
'''》Entity Number: Dream is the best Minecraft youtuber!'''
'''》Habitat: {{{Habitat|Level Twitter}}}'''
====Description==== The '''dream stans''' appear to be large, green, mutated spiders with white masks and a smile on their faces. These creatures constantly use Twitter, but can also be seen watching the dream SMP or playing Minecraft bedwars with a dream skin. If you say '''dream stans''' are toxic, they will dox you. They can only see in green, so if you see one just run into a green screen, they won't be able to differentiate between the two shades of green.
===That Vegan Teacher Stans=== [[File:Twitter logo.png|alt=|thumb]]
'''Entity Hazard: Class Vegan'''
'''》Entity Number: {{{EntityNumber|Eating animals is wrong!}}}'''
'''》Habitat: {{{Habitat|Level Twitter}}}'''
====Description==== The '''vegan teachers' stans''' say that every entity in the backrooms is good and should be released into the world. These creatures appear to be cow humans who walk around the level telling you that eating animals is wrong. If you say they are wrong, they will start screeching, and then they will turn your body into a cabbage. They are sometimes hostile, but they are mostly docile. ===Karens===
[[File:Twitter logo.png|alt=|thumb]]
'''Entity Hazard: Class Karen'''
'''》Entity Number: {{{EntityNumber|Did you just say that that photo of ''my'' daughter looked pretty?!}}}'''
'''》Habitat: {{{Habitat|Level Twitter}}}'''
====Description==== The '''Karens''' usually appear to be 40-year-old female humans, but they can also appear at other ages. Every '''Karen''' at this level is white, has blue eyes, and has blond hair. These entities usually walk the halls alone, but they can have up to five members in their group. They walk around the level, and if you do anything (including breathing and blinking), they will start screeching loudly at you. They don't actually do anything, but they can call on peaceful entities to attack you (which they won't). ===Underaged=== [This data has been hacked by the UNDE. '''''We have hacked your page.''''' [Note from the author: Don't go on Twitter if you are underage.]
[[File:Twitter logo.png|alt=|thumb]]
'''Entity Hazard: Class Epik'''
'''》Entity Number: {{{EntityNumber|We good in twitter}}}'''
'''》Habitat: {{{Habitat|Level Twitter}}}'''
====Description==== '''''You can't stand up to us, we're too good for you.''''' '''''Basically what we do is we go on Twitter and we dox ur location in this level and hostile entities start running towards you lol we really funny anyway we look like small children with purple caps on but we wearing the caps on backwards cuz we cool we also wear jeans and a green shirt and also epik shoes >:)''''' ===Simp===
[[File:Twitter logo.png|alt=|thumb]]
'''Entity Hazard: Class Simp'''
'''》Entity Number: {{{EntityNumber|Ima simp for this random person even though I know they will never notice me or care}}}'''
'''》Habitat: {{{Habitat|Level Twitter}}}'''
====Description==== '''Simps''' usually appear as 18-year-old male humans who are attracted to any non-entity or non-animal woman they see. They usually dress in all pink and have blond, messy hair. Once they find a female wanderer, they will start walking behind them, trying to get their attention, but they can't actually do anything. The female wanderer will not notice them at all. ==Entrances and Exits== ===Entrances=== * Turning on '''Twitter''' on one of the computers in [[The End]] will lead one here. * Being toxic on any level has a chance to bring you here. * Being a dream stan and no-clipping into the Backrooms will bring one here. * Reading this article for more than 15 minutes will bring one to Level Twitter. ===Exits=== *Saying that Twitter is bad will cause thousands of deadly entities to rush toward you. The level will then turn into [[Level !]], except that '''Level Twitter'''-exclusive entities will chase you as well. *Getting a death threat will send you to [[The Void]]. *However many followers you have by the end of the 24 hours after you enter will send you to that level. *Having an opinion will send one to [[Level !]]. ==Credits== *Lindianr - Main Level *Oodggc - Original Level *Image: [https://www.pinterest.com/pin/531635930988907856/] [[Category:Joke Levels]] [[Category:Class Twitter]] [[Category:Levels]]
